products.title: iPhone 14

products.title: Iphone X
products.description: Compatible with iPhone X. Shockproof and scratch-resistant design. Slim, lightweight, and comfortable to hold. Precise cutouts for easy access to all functions. Enhanced protection for screen and camera. Keep your iPhone X safe and looking brand new with this stylish and reliable phone case.
